meta.description: Floret flower studio in Poltava — bouquets, decor, wedding florals.

home.heroTagline: We create bouquets you’ll love to give and receive
home.aboutBody:
Floret was founded in 2016 in the heart of Poltava.

Since then, we’ve been making bouquets for special moments — with attention to detail and a sense of style.

We’re about beauty, refinement, and an approach that isn’t ordinary. That’s why people choose us.
home.teamBioTanya: Owner, florist, and your express courier. She always looks out for your bouquets and doesn’t trust taxi drivers. And yes — she can stir things up a little even in the calmest situations.
home.teamBioZhenya: She sets the tone for our bouquets. She builds unconventional, thoughtful compositions with real taste. One more thing: a total bookworm — 30 books a month is normal (where she finds time to read them is still an open question).
home.teamBioYana: Our dreamy introvert with a very fine sense of style. She creates refined, aesthetic bouquets. And if you ever lost someone fluffy on the street — chances are Yana has already taken care of them.
home.featuredSubtitle: Flower selection may vary with season and availability while keeping the chosen style and mood.
home.editorialBody: We style venues, events, and other spaces. Have a custom project in mind? Leave a request — we’ll get in touch to discuss the details with you.
home.decorFormSuccess: Thank you! We’ll contact you shortly.
home.decorFormError: Could not send. Please try again or message us on Instagram.
home.ctaStrip: Ready to make the day special? Leave an order — we’ll call back to confirm.
home.gallerySubtitle: A glimpse of our mood and composition — stems may vary with the season.

wedding.metaDescription: Custom wedding bouquets and venue florals in Poltava. Send a request — we’ll discuss details and budget.
wedding.title: Wedding florals
wedding.intro: We create wedding bouquets and ceremony or reception decor to your brief. Share your wishes, approximate budget, and date — we’ll get in touch to align the details.
wedding.formSuccess: Thank you! We’ll contact you shortly.
wedding.formError: Could not send. Please try again or message us on Instagram.

catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.styleDisclaimer: Flower selection may vary with season and availability while keeping the chosen style and mood. The catalog shows styles, not a fixed stem list.
catalog.colorMoodHint: Same labels as in the product editor (pink, blue, yellow, red, white, bright).

product.styleNote: Stems may change with season and availability; we’ll build the arrangement in the same mood and style as in the photo.

order.title: Order
order.priceFloorHint: Minimum for the selected size is {min}. You can enter a higher amount — that’s your agreed bouquet budget.
order.agreedAmountHint: Suggested amount for the selected size; increase it if you want a more generous composition.
order.deliveryPricingNote: We confirm the final fee after the address is clear (taxi rates may vary).
order.dateFormatHint: Pick a date from the calendar (how it looks depends on your browser).
order.deliverySameDayRules: Same-day delivery orders are accepted until {orderCutoff}; delivery that day runs until {deliveryEnd}.
order.addressAutocompleteHint: Suggestions are limited to Poltava Oblast (Google). You can type the full address manually.
order.addressManualFallback: Suggestions unavailable — enter the full address (street, building, city).
order.privacy: I agree to the processing of personal data to place this order.
order.sameDayOrderClosed: We’re no longer accepting same-day delivery orders for today. Choose another date or pickup.
order.errorServerConfig: Server misconfiguration: check NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY in .env.local.
order.errorDatabase: Could not save your order. The database may be missing migrations (orders table or product_size column). Contact us on Instagram.
order.errorInvalidProduct: Product not found. Refresh the page and try again.
order.errorInvalidSize: Choose an available bouquet size for this product.
order.errorTooMany: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.
order.error: Something went wrong. Try again or message us on Instagram.
order.successReserve: Order received. We’ll contact you shortly.

validation.nameRequired: Please enter a name or title.
validation.phoneUa: Use a Ukrainian number in the +380 format with 9 digits.
validation.privacyRequired: Consent is required to place an order.
validation.priceTooLow: The amount cannot be below the minimum for the selected size (S/M/L).

orderStatus.title: Order status
orderStatus.enterPhone: Enter the phone used for the order

about.title: Our story
about.body: Floret is a flower studio in Poltava. We work with fresh flowers and create arrangements for every day and special occasions.

errors.paymentFailed: Payment was not completed. Try again or choose reservation.
